market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Cozy Country Barn – Private Stay for 4
Newly Renovated Barn – Ideal for Small Groups
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to our cosy, newly renovated barn, a tranquil countryside retreat perfect for a small group of up to four guests. This entire‑home property blends rustic charm with modern comforts, offering a spacious bedroom, a bright living area, a fully equipped kitchen and a clean bathroom. Guests consistently love their stay, reflected in a 4.78 rating from 186 reviews. Although we are new to hosting and not yet a Superhost, we are committed to providing a memorable experience. Set at £178 per night, the barn is competitively priced—only 2 % above the local median nightly rate of £175—yet our current occupancy for the next 90 days is only 15.2 % booked, leaving 76 open nights and significant revenue potential. The property currently lists no specific amenities, so adding outdoor features, dedicated parking and entertainment options would further enhance its appeal. Located within easy reach of local attractions, the barn offers a peaceful base for exploring the surrounding area. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet evening by a fire pit, taking a stroll through nearby trails, or simply relaxing in the comfortable living space, this barn provides a unique blend of seclusion and convenience. Book now to experience the charm of countryside living in a freshly updated setting.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use an exterior shot of the barn with surrounding countryside as the cover photo to highlight the unique property type and attract search clicks.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate (£178) is only +2 % above the cohort median, yet occupancy is just 15.2 % booked versus the market median 28.3 % – a clear revenue leak.
The title "Cosy Newly Renovated Barn" lacks key search terms like capacity and location; updating it can improve SEO and click‑through rates.
No photos are listed; adding at least 12 high‑quality images (exterior, bedroom, living area, kitchen, bathroom) can dramatically boost booking confidence.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 76 open nights in the next 90 days, representing about £13.5k of untapped revenue.
